article.title: AI Receptionist for Local Business: What to Automate

facebook.caption:
AI Receptionist for Local Business: What to Automate

Local businesses can automate instant replies, simple intake, missed-call recovery, and reminders without turning complex sales conversations into a script.

Read it: https://eb28.co/blog/ai-receptionist-for-local-business-what-to-automate-and-what-to-keep-human-2026-06/

linkedin.caption:
Refreshed EB28 growth guide: AI Receptionist for Local Business: What to Automate

The practical split is simple: automate confirmation, qualification, routing, and reminders; keep pricing judgment, exceptions, complaints, and trust-heavy conversations human.

https://eb28.co/blog/ai-receptionist-for-local-business-what-to-automate-and-what-to-keep-human-2026-06/

instagram.caption:
AI receptionist for local business: automate the repeatable steps, keep the trust moments human.

Full guide: eb28.co/blog/
instagram.creativeBrief: Carousel: missed lead problem, automate-first checklist, keep-human checklist, first-five-minute handoff, CTA to EB28 project brief.

shortFormVideo.hook: Your AI receptionist should not replace your best sales judgment.
shortFormVideo.script: Open with missed calls and slow form replies. Show the automate list: confirmation, qualifying questions, reminders, source tagging. Cut to the human list: pricing, exceptions, complaints, and high-value consults. Close with: build the handoff first, then add more automation.
